name: ech-0296
description: eCH-0296 – Erlasse und Gesetzestexte — annotation stack (dokieli + Recogito + pdf.js + Solid, W3C Web Annotation)
author: Martin Gajdos <martin.gajdos@me.com>
comment:dokieli: dokieli is not on npm and needs Node>=22 + a build (patch-package). Add via one of: (a) prebuilt self-hosted dist, or (b) 'npm i github:dokieli/dokieli' after upgrading Node and installing patch-package. See README.
